## Introduction to Qualtrics {#slide-1}

01-25-2023

## Contents {#slide-2}

Build a survey

UH Café experience

Build a report

Ice cream shop experience

## Slide 3

![](ppt/media/image1.png "Picture 4")

## UH Café customers experience  {#slide-4}

![](ppt/media/image2.png "Picture 3")

Food choices

Food quality

Environment

Staff

Waiting time

## Slide 5

        NPS; overall rating
  -- -- ------------------------------------------------
        Food quality? Food choices? Long waiting line?
        Treating you with courtesy and respect?
        Clean? Safe? Relaxing?

01

03

04

02

Key metric

Experience

Staff

Environment

## Slide 6

01

03

04

02

Design

Build

Distribution

Data collection and Processing

The components of a survey project

05

06

Reporting

Decision making

## Survey Design {#slide-7}

Captures the data that is ultimately used for decision-making.

Has a significant downstream impact on the quality of data.

## Best practice for designing a survey {#slide-8}

Set your research objectives

Make every question count

Plan the order of your questions

Limit survey length

Effective question-wording

Keep it simple for respondents

Qualtrics.com

## UH Café customers experience  {#slide-9}

![](ppt/media/image2.png "Picture 3")

Food choices

Food quality

Environment

Staff

Waiting time

## Optimize respondent experience {#slide-10}

Low cognitive load

Low effort to complete

## Questions {#slide-11}

How many times have you visited UH Café in the past three months?

Please select the type of food that you have tried in the past three months:

How much do you agree with the following statement: UH Café should provide more types of food.

What  type  of food you would like to see UH Cafe add? Please list them here.

Please rate the following in terms of how much you agree or disagree with each statement.

Food has high quality

UH Café staff is friendly

Eating environment is relaxing

Waiting time for getting food is less than 10 min

Overall is great

How likely are you to recommend UH Café to a friend or colleague?

## Slide 12

https://umich.qualtrics.com/homepage/ui

Level 1 

Click create a new project (left bottom)

![](ppt/media/image3.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 13

![](ppt/media/image4.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 14

![Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated](ppt/media/image5.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 15

![](ppt/media/image6.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 16

![](ppt/media/image7.png "Picture 4")

![](ppt/media/image8.png "Picture 8")

## Slide 17

## Slide 18

![](ppt/media/image10.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 19

![](ppt/media/image11.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 20

![](ppt/media/image12.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 21

![](ppt/media/image13.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 22

![](ppt/media/image14.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 23

![](ppt/media/image16.png "Picture 8")

## Slide 24

![](ppt/media/image17.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 25

![](ppt/media/image18.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 26

![](ppt/media/image19.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 27

![](ppt/media/image20.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 28

![](ppt/media/image21.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 29

![](ppt/media/image22.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 30

![](ppt/media/image21.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 31

![](ppt/media/image23.png "Picture 4")

## Most  surveys (u p to 53%) are completed on mobile devices. {#slide-32}

- "mobile-friendly" can help increase both completion rates and the representativeness of your data.

Facts

- Sometimes matrix questions are not mobile-friendly.

## Slide 33

![](ppt/media/image15.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 34

![](ppt/media/image17.png "Picture 4")

## Text entry boxes {#slide-35}

Takes mental energy

Completion rates decline

Sometimes hard to analyze 

## Slide 36

![](ppt/media/image24.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 37

![](ppt/media/image25.png "Picture 4")

## Informed consent {#slide-38}

Click "import from library"

Type "consent" in search box

Click "informed consent"

Click "add requirements, force response"

Click "skip logic, if disagree, end survey"

## Slide 39

![](ppt/media/image26.png "Picture 4")

## Recap {#slide-40}

Survey design

Build a survey

Question types

Be careful with matrix and open-text questions

Preview and publish

Distribution

## Slide 41

01

03

04

02

Design

Build

Distribution

Data collection and Processing

The components of a survey project

05

06

Reporting

Decision making

## Ice Cream Shop Survey {#slide-42}

How many times have you visited the Q Ice Cream Shop in the past year?

What is your overall level of satisfaction with the Q Ice Cream Shop?

Please select the flavors that you have tried in the past:

How likely would you be to purchase a new  orange vanilla  flavor if we added it to our menu?

How likely would you be to purchase a new  butter pecan  flavor if we added it to our menu?

If there are any other flavors that you would like to see us add, please list them here.

## Slide 43

![](ppt/media/image27.png "Picture 2")

![](ppt/media/image28.png "Picture 5")

## Slide 44

![](ppt/media/image29.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 45

![](ppt/media/image30.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 46

![](ppt/media/image31.png "Picture 4")

## Your turn {#slide-47}

Start a new report, make charts for questions 3,4,5,6

Preview public report

![](ppt/media/image28.png "Picture 3")

## Slide 48

![](ppt/media/image32.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 49

![](ppt/media/image33.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 50

![](ppt/media/image34.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 51

![](ppt/media/image35.png "Picture 4")

200 respondents were extremely satisfied with the Q Ice Cream Shop.  How many times did they visit the shop in the past year?

## Slide 52

![](ppt/media/image36.png "Picture 4")

Add filter

## Slide 53

![](ppt/media/image37.png "Picture 4")

![](ppt/media/image38.png "Picture 8")

## Slide 54

![](ppt/media/image38.png "Picture 4")

## Slide 55

![](ppt/media/image39.png "Picture 4")

## Recap {#slide-56}

Build a report

Bar charts, pie charts, table

Data & Analysis

Data

Export to csv, excel, SPSS,  etc

Stats  iQ

Descriptive stats

Crosstabs  iQ

## Resources {#slide-57}

https://basecamp.qualtrics.com

https://libguides.library.kent.edu/qualtrics/howto

## Patient experience survey questions {#slide-58}

![](ppt/media/image40.png "Picture 4")
